name: ai-native-methodology
description: AI-Native 개발 방법론 — SDLC 6단계 chain harness Claude Code plugin (사내 표준). ★ v4.1 multi-agent paradigm — stage 별 sub-agent (discovery 본격 / plan placeholder) + 3 base + spike (main agent = orchestrator + Task tool dispatch). Analysis stage (legacy 분석 / 7대 산출물 + finding + antipatterns + migration-cautions) + chain gate (discovery → spec → test RED → impl GREEN / plan stage = HOW placeholder / gate #1~#4) + traceability matrix + 70~80% 한계 명시. 변경 이력은 CHANGELOG.md 참조.
